ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "race" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., Circuit Judge Family Court 42nd Judicial Circuit 2nd Division Unexpired Term) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, in_progress, completed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the election */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the election */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of early voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate is running in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate (e.g., Democratic, Republican, Nonpartisan) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the candidate (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the county (e.g., CAL for Calloway County) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the county (e.g., Western, Eastern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote cast */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the vote was cast in */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the vote was cast */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the vote */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "vote_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of vote (e.g., absentee, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_vote_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vote_type_id") REFERENCES vote_types ("vote_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of votes cast for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, election_officer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vote_types" (
  "vote_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote type */,
  "vote_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vote type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vote type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official (e.g., County Clerk) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the election official (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_officials_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling station */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the polling station is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the polling station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the polling station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_stations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity (e.g., login, logout, update election results) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
